mapper.select:
SELECT id, menu_name, parent_id, order_num, path, component, query, is_frame, link, is_cache, menu_type, visible, status, perms, icon, create_by, create_by_name, create_time, update_by, update_by_name, update_time, remark, menu_icon_color, data_type FROM sys_menu
id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_menu ( id, menu_name, parent_id, order_num, path, component, query, is_frame, is_cache, menu_type, visible, status, perms, icon, create_by, create_by_name, create_time, remark, menu_icon_color, data_type, link ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{menuName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{parentId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{orderNum, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{path, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{component, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{query, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isFrame, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{isCache, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{menuType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{visible, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{perms, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{icon, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId}, #{loginUserName}, #{now}, #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{menuIconColor, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dataType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{link, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE sys_menu SET menu_name = #{menuName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, parent_id = #{parentId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, order_num = #{orderNum, jdbcType=BIGINT}, path = #{path, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, component = #{component, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, query = #{query, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, is_frame = #{isFrame, jdbcType=BIGINT}, is_cache = #{isCache, jdbcType=BIGINT}, menu_type = #{menuType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, visible = #{visible, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status = #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, perms = #{perms, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, icon = #{icon, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_by = #{loginUserId}, update_by_name = #{loginUserName}, update_time = #{now}, remark = #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, menu_icon_color = #{menuIconColor, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, data_type = #{dataType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, link = #{link, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT a.id AS menu_id, a.menu_name, a.parent_id, a.order_num, a.path, a.component, a.query, a.is_frame, a.is_cache, a.menu_type, a.visible, a.status, a.data_type, a.icon_app, a.APP_TYPE, CASE a.status WHEN '1' THEN '正常' ELSE '停用' END AS statusLabel, IFNULL(a.perms, '') AS perms, a.icon, a.create_time, a.link FROM sys_menu a INNER JOIN sys_role_menu b ON b.menu_id = a.id INNER JOIN sys_role_user c ON c.role_id = b.role_id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} AND a.data_type = 'APP' AND a.status = '0' ORDER BY a.parent_id, a.order_num

SELECT a.id AS menu_id, a.menu_name, a.parent_id, a.order_num, a.path, a.component, a.query, a.is_frame, a.is_cache, a.menu_type, a.visible, a.status, a.data_type, a.icon_app, CASE a.status WHEN '1' THEN '正常' ELSE '停用' END AS statusLabel, IFNULL(a.perms, '') AS perms, a.icon, a.create_time FROM sys_menu a INNER JOIN sys_role_menu b ON b.menu_id = a.id INNER JOIN sys_role_user c ON c.role_id = b.role_id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} AND a.data_type = 'APPLET' AND a.status = '0' ORDER BY a.parent_id, a.order_num
SELECT a.id, a.menu_name AS label, CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(b1.id) FROM sys_menu b1 WHERE b1.parent_id = a.id) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS isAlwaysShow FROM sys_menu a WHERE a.parent_id = #{parentId}

SELECT a.id, a.id AS menuId, a.menu_name, a.parent_id, a.order_num, a.path, a.component, a.query, a.is_frame, a.link, a.is_cache, a.menu_type, a.visible, a.status, a.perms, a.icon, a.create_by, a.create_by_name, a.create_time, a.update_by, a.update_by_name, a.update_time, a.remark, a.menu_icon_color, a.data_type FROM sys_menu a WHERE a.menu_type IN ('C', 'M')
